CPR_FAST_INIT.Settings.Enabled.Name: Skip 3D dice for initiative
CPR_FAST_INIT.Settings.Enabled.Hint: When enabled, initiative rolls in Cyberpunk Red Core skip Dice So Nice's 3D animation. Other rolls keep their animation. World-scope setting - GM controls for the entire table.
CPR_FAST_INIT.Settings.MatchByFlavor.Hin: Optional. If your initiative rolls do not set the standard `flags.core.initiativeRoll` flag, also match chat messages whose flavor contains the word "initiative" (case-insensitive). Leave off unless the standard flag detection misses your initiative rolls. World-scope setting - GM only.
CPR_FAST_INIT.Notification.DSNMissing: CPR Fast Initiative requires Dice So Nice. Please install and activate it.
CPR_FAST_INIT.Notification.LibWrapperMis: CPR Fast Initiative requires the lib-wrapper module. Please install and activate it.
